parameters.query:
INSERT INTO exentia.leads (lead_ref, session_id, event_type, page_path, landing_version,
gclid, gbraid, wbraid, fbclid, msclkid,
utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term,
utm_source_first, utm_medium_first, utm_campaign_first, utm_content_first, utm_term_first,
referrer, time_on_page_ms, scroll_depth_pct,
user_agent, device_type, screen_size, language, timezone_offset,
ghl_contact_id, extra)
SELECT lead_ref, session_id, event_type, page_path, landing_version,
gclid, gbraid, wbraid, fbclid, msclkid,
utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term,
utm_source_first, utm_medium_first, utm_campaign_first, utm_content_first, utm_term_first,
referrer, time_on_page_ms, scroll_depth_pct,
user_agent, device_type, screen_size, language, timezone_offset,
ghl_contact_id, extra
FROM jsonb_populate_record(NULL::exentia.leads, $1::jsonb)
RETURNING id, lead_ref;
